mapper.select: SELECT p.*, pd.drug_id, pd.usage_route, pd.frequency, pd.single_dose, pd.use_days, pd.drug_number, d.drug_name, d.drug_format as specification, d.drug_price as price FROM prescription p LEFT JOIN prescription_detail pd ON p.id = pd.prescription_id LEFT JOIN drug_info d ON pd.drug_id = d.id WHERE p.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY p.creation_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE prescription SET prescription_status = 'DISPENSED', pharmacist_id = #{pharmacistId}, dispense_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
